summary: Iteration 41 testing complete. All requested features verified: 1) ProductCard displays shipping info (Free shipping badge with truck icon), 2) Products page has Free Shipping checkbox filter that works, 3) Certification filters show clean text labels without emojis, 4) StoresListPage map view shows SVG Spain map with city markers, 5) Text legibility improved with darker colors.

issues: AI chat widget covers part of the filter sidebar - known minor issue
Some TEST_ products have broken image placeholders - test data issue, not a bug

passed_tests: ProductCard: Shipping info displays with truck icon and 'Free shipping' text in green
ProductCard: All products show free shipping (shipping_cost is null in DB as expected)
ProductsPage: Free Shipping checkbox filter present with truck icon
ProductsPage: Free Shipping filter checkbox toggles correctly (green when checked)
ProductsPage: Free Shipping active filter tag appears at top when filter is active
ProductsPage: Certification filters show clean text labels (Halal, Kosher, Vegan, Gluten-Free, Sugar-Free, Orgánico)
ProductsPage: NO emojis in certification filter labels
StoresListPage: Grid view shows store cards correctly
StoresListPage: SVG Spain map displays with recognizable country outline
StoresListPage: Spain map shows city markers (Madrid, Barcelona, Sevilla)
StoresListPage: Map view shows '2 stores found' count
Text legibility: Product names use dark color (rgb(28, 28, 28))
Text legibility: Trust signals use dark color for good contrast
Text legibility: Certification badges use readable color (rgb(74, 74, 74))
Backend: /api/stores returns store list with location data
critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.js: Shipping info implementation is clean - uses isFreeShipping logic based on shipping_cost being null/0
ProductsPage.js: Free Shipping filter properly sends free_shipping=true parameter to backend
ProductsPage.js: Certification options array correctly has NO emojis - clean text labels only
StoresListPage.js: SVG maps for Spain, USA, Korea are well-implemented with viewBox, paths, and city markers
All text colors appear to use stone-500/600 or darker for good legibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified all UI improvements: 1) ProductCard shipping info shows 'Free shipping' with green truck icon - all products currently have null shipping_cost so all show free shipping. 2) Free Shipping filter checkbox works and sends free_shipping=true to backend. 3) Certification filters have clean text labels without emojis. 4) StoresListPage SVG Spain map displays correctly with Madrid, Barcelona, Sevilla markers. 5) Text colors are dark (stone-900/700) for good legibility.

product_card_shipping_info.details: Truck icon with 'Free shipping' text in green. All products show free shipping since shipping_cost is null in DB.

free_shipping_filter.details: Checkbox filter with truck icon. Toggles correctly, shows active filter tag. Backend accepts free_shipping=true parameter.

certification_filters_no_emojis.details: Clean text labels: Halal, Kosher, Vegan, Gluten-Free, Sugar-Free, Orgánico. No emoji characters.

stores_svg_map.details: Spain SVG map displays with recognizable outline, city markers (Madrid, Barcelona, Sevilla), and beige fill color.

text_legibility.details: Text colors are dark (rgb(28,28,28) for names, rgb(74,74,74) for badges) providing good contrast on light backgrounds.
